title: Wither's Wrath [RP]
description: Resource Pack for the Wither's Wrath data pack
body:
# Wither's Wrath Resource Pack Addon

This addon for the Wither's Wrath datapack enhances your boss battle experience with custom audio. It includes:

- **Phase 1 Music:**  
  Plays during the initial phase of the fight.  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/3NlkqN3O1MU?si=Dgajxa3QPNhHUGiY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- **Phase 2 Music:**  
  Activates during the more aggressive second phase.  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/OsOWi_3RFu4?si=PY9nH59AFaqSVR1Z" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

- **Death Sound:**  
  A custom sound effect that plays upon the Wither's demise.

---

Preview video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/hgCDz91eXhE?si=8B3aZQ2LZ3AEBf2d" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Trophy for 1.21.5+

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/8vcw11yIJIU?si=ZBTSaBuxiUgIqw24" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Installation

1. Download and install the [Wither's Wrath Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/witherswrath) or check out the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/ImHer0/witherswrath) for full details.
2. Place this resource pack addon in your `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Activate it in the Minecraft options menu.

## Links

- **GitHub Repository:** [https://github.com/ImHer0/witherswrath](https://github.com/ImHer0/witherswrath)
- **Modrinth Page:** [https://modrinth.com/datapack/witherswrath](https://modrinth.com/datapack/witherswrath)


Enjoy your enhanced Wither battle experience!
